# Version 1 — Initial Release

**Date:** 2025-07-12
**Git Tag:** v1.0
**Commit:** a6ac4a7

---

## Summary

First documented version of Stackr. Includes the complete habit tracking application with behavioral psychology features, mobile-responsive UI, Google Calendar integration, email reminders, and dark/light theming.

---

## Core Features

### Habit Management
- Create, edit, delete habits with name, time slot (Morning/Afternoon/Evening), category, cue, reward
- Categories: health, mind, work, social, general
- Daily completion toggles with streak tracking (current and best)

### Dashboard
- Personalized greeting with time-of-day awareness
- Habits grouped by time slot with completion toggles
- Consistency score (30-day rolling average)
- Mini calendar showing daily completion density
- Suggestion panel for declining habits
- Restart prompts for habits missed ≥2 days
- Skeleton loading screen (shimmer animation) while data loads

### Views
- **All Habits** — Full table with streaks, notes, bulk actions
- **Add Habit** — Creation form with optional Google Calendar sync
- **Monthly** — Calendar grid with per-day completion percentages
- **Daily** — Today's habits organized by time slot
- **Stacking** — Drag-and-drop habit sequence builder with tutorial
- **Analytics** — Streaks, weekly rates, 12-week bar chart, year heatmap
- **Implementation Intentions** — "After [cue], I will [habit] at [time/location]" builder
- **Review** — Weekly burndown summary

### Google Calendar Integration
- Sync habits and intentions as recurring calendar events
- Configurable time, duration, frequency (DAILY/WEEKLY/WEEKDAYS)

### Email Reminders
- Daily digest emails via Resend API
- Timezone-aware scheduling (cron-triggered)
- Deduplication (one email per user per day)
- HMAC-signed unsubscribe links

### Authentication
- Google OAuth via NextAuth
- JWT session strategy
- Protected routes via middleware (`proxy.js`)

### Theming
- Dark/light mode toggle
- CSS custom properties for all design tokens
- Serif (Cormorant Garamond) + Sans (DM Sans) + Mono (DM Mono) typography

---

## Mobile Responsiveness (v1 Polish)

### Bugs Fixed

#### Bug: Popup scroll-through on mobile
- **Symptom:** Background content scrolled when modals were open on mobile
- **Root Cause:** Body scroll not locked when modals opened
- **Fixes Tried:** N/A — fixed on first attempt
- **Actual Fix:** Added `document.body.style.overflow = "hidden"` in useEffect for all modals (AddHabitModal, CalendarSuccessModal, CalendarErrorModal, Sidebar drawer) + `overscrollBehavior: "contain"` and `touchAction: "none"` on modal overlays
- **Files Modified:** `app/app/page.js`
- **Rollback:** Remove useEffect scroll lock blocks and overlay style props from each modal

#### Bug: Landing page banners not collapsing on mobile
- **Symptom:** Banner section didn't stack to single column on mobile
- **Root Cause:** CSS targeted `.banner-grid` but HTML used `.banner-content` class
- **Actual Fix:** Changed CSS selector from `.banner-grid` to `.banner-content` + enhanced mobile styles for hero, banners, sections, FAQ, contact, footer
- **Files Modified:** `public/landing.html`
- **Rollback:** Revert the `<style>` media query section in `landing.html`

#### Bug: Dashboard calendar showing beside habits on mobile
- **Symptom:** Mini calendar appeared next to habits instead of below on small screens
- **Root Cause:** `gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 280px"` didn't collapse on mobile
- **Actual Fix:** Added `stackr-dashboard-grid` CSS class with `grid-template-columns: 1fr !important` at 680px breakpoint
- **Files Modified:** `app/app/page.js`, `app/globals.css`
- **Rollback:** Remove `stackr-dashboard-grid` class usage and CSS rule

#### Bug: Analytics heatmap overflowing horizontally
- **Symptom:** Year heatmap (53 weeks × 14px = ~742px) overflowed mobile viewport
- **Root Cause:** Fixed-width heatmap wider than mobile screens
- **Actual Fix:** Wrapped YearHeatmap in scrollable container with `overflowX: "auto"` and `minWidth: "680px"`
- **Files Modified:** `app/app/page.js`
- **Rollback:** Remove the scroll wrapper div around YearHeatmap

#### Bug: Settings panel alignment broken on mobile
- **Symptom:** Settings panel overflowed, sign out button and theme toggle misaligned
- **Root Cause:** Fixed positioning and flex layouts not adapting to mobile
- **Fixes Tried:** Multiple iterations with flex/width adjustments
- **Actual Fix:** Converted settings to full-width bottom sheet on mobile (`stackr-settings-panel` class), sign out button with `display: "block"` + `textAlign: "center"`, `maxWidth: calc(100vw - 40px)`
- **Files Modified:** `app/app/page.js`, `app/globals.css`
- **Rollback:** Remove `stackr-settings-panel` class and revert SettingsModal inline styles

---

## Files Modified (v1 Polish Session)

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `app/app/page.js` | Scroll locks on modals, stackr-view class on views, stackr-dashboard-grid, YearHeatmap scroll wrapper, DashboardSkeleton component, dataReady state, settings panel mobile fixes |
| `app/globals.css` | Added stackr-dashboard-grid, stackr-settings-panel, stackr-view mobile rules |
| `public/landing.html` | Fixed .banner-content selector, comprehensive mobile responsive CSS |

---

## Known State

- All views functional on desktop and mobile (680px breakpoint)
- Dark/light theme working
- Google Calendar sync operational
- Email reminders active (cron-triggered)
- Deployed on Vercel
- No known critical bugs

---

## Rollback Instructions

To revert to this version:
```bash
git checkout v1.0
```

To revert just the mobile polish changes:
```bash
git revert a6ac4a7
```
